title: Resources
description: Manage the models, translation services and GPU acceleration used by your tasks

engines.title: Transcription Engines
engines.description: Choose the engine for speech-to-text. whisper.cpp is built in by default; faster-whisper requires a separate download.

builtin.name: whisper.cpp (built-in)
builtin.desc: Default engine with ggml quantized models and GPU acceleration

fasterWhisper.name: faster-whisper
fasterWhisper.desc: CTranslate2-based engine with faster inference; models download from HuggingFace on demand
fasterWhisper.downloadConfirm: This will download the faster-whisper engine runtime (~170MB). Continue?

localCli.name: Local CLI
localCli.desc: Use a self-installed Whisper-compatible command-line tool

engines.switchBlocked: A task is running. Wait for it to finish before switching engines.

overview.noModels: No model installed yet — transcription tasks cannot start
overview.noProviders: No translation service configured yet — required for translation tasks
overview.gpuOnlyOnCpu: GPU-only mode set, but running on CPU
overview.cudaUpgradeHint: Upgrade to CUDA {{version}} for better performance
